history: The patient developed super-refractory status epilepticus (SRSE) after focal seizures. Initial investigations, including MRI, CSF analysis, and autoimmune panels, were normal. She had extensive treatment with several anti-seizure medications, immunotherapy, attempt of treatment with ketogenic diet and anesthetic infusions targeting burst-suppression.
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings not provided.
labs: MRI: normal, CSF analysis: normal, autoimmune panels: normal, Trio whole genome sequencing: compound heterozygous pathogenic variants in POLG.
